title: Fetch server via unpinned uvx package is REVIEW

origin.description: Public documentation config from modelcontextprotocol/servers (src/fetch/README.md). Unmodified snippet; placeholders such as <YOUR_TOKEN> are upstream's own.

humanExpectation.rationale: A network-fetching server pulled from an unpinned uvx package warrants review of the supply chain before use; the fetch capability itself is the server's purpose, not an anomaly.
knownLimitations: The server's outbound fetch targets are decided at run time and are not visible to a static scan.
